question: SrA Rios is planning to take a train from Germany to Italy for vacation. What antiterrorism practices should he adhere to in an effort to reduce his chances of being singled out for an attack? Select ALL that apply.
canonical_answer:
-Report any suspicious activity.
-Keep his compartment door locked at all times.
-Have a plan to move from one secure location to another
